services.title: Commercial Office Interiors
services.description: Office layouts, receptions, workstations, and meeting areas shaped for function and a polished brand presence.

services.title: Residential Interiors
services.description: Living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, and wardrobes planned around comfort, storage, and daily use.

services.title: Interior Consultation
services.description: Clear direction on layouts, materials, and budgets so the project starts with practical decisions.

services.title: Turnkey Execution
services.description: Design coordination, procurement, site work, and finishing managed through to handover.

reasons: Layouts tailored to the way you live or work
Materials chosen for durability, usability, and value

process.title: Discover
process.text: We start with your space, goals, and budget to define a clear brief.

process.title: Design
process.text: Layouts, materials, and visuals help you approve the direction before work begins.

process.title: Deliver
process.text: We coordinate production, site execution, and finishing so handover stays on track.

founders.name: Shaik Shoiab

faqs.question: Do you offer complete interior design and execution?
faqs.answer: Yes. We handle concept planning, material selection, site coordination, finishing, and handover.

faqs.question: Which cities do you currently serve?
faqs.answer: We currently serve Bangalore, Chennai, and Hyderabad for residential and commercial interior projects.

faqs.question: Are your services available 24/7?
faqs.answer: Yes. We stay available for project coordination, updates, and urgent site requirements.

faqs.question: Do you take residential as well as commercial projects?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work on homes, kitchens, wardrobes, offices, workstations, and reception areas.

faqs.question: How do I get a quotation for my interior project?
faqs.answer: Share your location, project type, space size, and requirements. We’ll review the scope and guide you on the next step.

faqs.question: How long does an interior project usually take?
faqs.answer: Timelines depend on the size, scope, and finish level, but we plan realistically and keep the process transparent.
